title: tussilago piloselloides
intro: Tussilago piloselloides, also known as woolly hawk's beard or meadow hawk's beard, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The health benefits of Tussilago piloselloides include soothing sore throats, relieving congestion, and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall respiratory well-being.
